metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins by vdsmon. Each skill ships as its own plugin so you can pick and choose. Plugins prefixed with cc- are Claude-Code-specific (hooks, dynamic context injection, or ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}); unprefixed plugins port cleanly to other SKILL.md-native hosts (OpenAI Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Goose, Copilot, etc.).

plugins.name: skill-polish
plugins.description: Post-mortem for any skill — scans a session for friction and applies concrete edits to the responsible skill file. Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts.

plugins.name: cc-tokenomics
plugins.description: Token usage, cache hit rates, and Max plan consumption analyzer. /cc-tokenomics dashboard + reference docs on rate limits, cache lifecycle, and empirical billing experiments. Claude Code only.

plugins.name: cc-cache-keepalive
plugins.description: Keeps Claude Code's prompt cache warm on Max plans via a SessionStart-scheduled silent cron. Opt-in via ~/.cc-cache-keepalive flag file. Cron prompt is sentinel 'cc-cache-keepalive' — gate Stop hooks on it to silence turn-end sounds. Claude Code only (hook + cron).

plugins.name: pre-compact
plugins.description: Audit in-flight state before any context-compacting step; produce a copy-paste /compact message plus a queue-able follow-up that chains the next action when compact finishes. Portable across Agent Skills hosts — compacting is a general concept, not Claude-specific.

plugins.name: humanize
plugins.description: Strip AI-writing tells from text. Detects em-dash overuse, AI vocabulary, inflated significance, rule-of-three, sycophancy, and 20+ more patterns. Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts.

plugins.name: ship-it
plugins.description: Push branch, open draft PR, attach reviewers, then wait on CI and the AI code reviewer in a fix loop until green. Ticket-agnostic. Supported stack today: Bitbucket Cloud + bkt CLI + CodeRabbit. Adapter slots reserved for gh + other reviewer bots.

plugins.name: loop-finder
plugins.description: Loop discovery + race + feature-driven iteration. Two skills: loop-finder (engineers a self-verifiable gate for a task class, races parallel variants, converges on the best loop config; HITL concentrated at permission boundaries) and feature-cycle (outer queued-fix chain that ships features against the converged gate, retros pain, queues one harness fix per cycle — Karpathy autoresearch discipline applied to dev experience).

plugins.name: flow
plugins.description: Multi-tracker pipeline (Jira | beads) with pluggable per-stage handlers, immutable ship-event evidence, and a compounding memory layer fed by the reflect stage and recalled at SessionStart. Workspace-configurable stages via stage-registry.toml + workspace.toml. Claude-Code-only (SessionStart hook + dynamic context injection wired in later phases).
